case_title: WEST EAST HOLDINGS LLC VS. ANN M. MURRAY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST EAST HOLDINGS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, ANN M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
